selection.feature_policy: Cargo-selected features from codex-cli; --all-features is not used

fedora_macro_graph.reason: Matches cargo2rpm license-breakdown and license-summary graph selection.

generator.selected_source_license_verification: Registry Cargo.toml metadata comes from checksum-verified archives; Git metadata comes from exact commit objects after normalized repository URL and tracked-checkout verification; workspace metadata comes from the exact release source copy.
generator.legacy_license_normalization: Replace each slash-separated Cargo alternative with SPDX OR, matching Fedora cargo2rpm license output normalization.

linux_cargo_linked.expression: ((Apache-2.0 OR MIT) AND BSD-3-Clause) AND ((MIT OR Apache-2.0) AND Apache-2.0) AND (0BSD OR MIT OR Apache-2.0) AND Apache-2.0 AND (Apache-2.0 AND ISC) AND (Apache-2.0 OR BSD-3-Clause) AND (Apache-2.0 OR BSL-1.0) AND (Apache-2.0 OR BSL-1.0 OR MIT) AND (Apache-2.0 OR GPL-2.0-only) AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC OR MIT) AND (Apache-2.0 OR MIT) AND (Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT) AND BSD-2-Clause AND (BSD-2-Clause OR Apache-2.0) AND (BSD-2-Clause OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT) AND BSD-3-Clause AND (BSD-3-Clause OR Apache-2.0) AND CC0-1.0 AND (CC0-1.0 OR Apache-2.0 OR Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception) AND (CC0-1.0 OR MIT-0 OR Apache-2.0) AND CDLA-Permissive-2.0 AND ISC AND (ISC AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC)) AND (ISC AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC) AND Apache-2.0 AND MIT AND BSD-3-Clause AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC OR MIT) AND (Apache-2.0 OR ISC OR MIT-0)) AND MIT AND (MIT AND BSD-3-Clause) AND (MIT OR Apache-2.0) AND (MIT OR Apache-2.0 OR Zlib) AND (MIT OR BSD-3-Clause) AND (MIT OR Zlib OR Apache-2.0) AND MPL-2.0 AND Unicode-3.0 AND (Unlicense OR MIT) AND Zlib AND (Zlib OR Apache-2.0 OR MIT)

final_binary.reason: Cargo manifest metadata does not cover the Rusty V8/Chromium native static source closure, system-library decisions, or required license texts.

native_static_components.scope: The v8 crate's Cargo license is recorded above; its statically linked Chromium/V8 implementation requires separate source and license accounting.

scope: Deterministic Cargo manifest license metadata and linked-graph accounting; not a complete native/static license closure, legal review, final RPM License expression, or source-publication approval.
